repos.author: mattpocock
repos.name: skills
repos.description: Agent Skills for real engineers. Straight from my .claude directory.
repos.summary: Matt Pocock 整理的 Agent Skills 集合，直接从他的 .claude 目录中提取。面向真实工程师的 AI 助手技能库，适合想快速上手 Claude/AI 编程助手的开发者。

repos.author: Alishahryar1
repos.name: free-claude-code
repos.description: Use claude-code for free in the terminal, VSCode extension or via discord like openclaw
repos.summary: 让你在终端、VSCode 扩展或 Discord 中免费使用 claude-code 的工具，类似于 openclaw 的使用方式。适合想白嫖 Claude Code 的开发者，但注意使用风险和合规性。

repos.author: Z4nzu
repos.name: hackingtool
repos.description: ALL IN ONE Hacking Tool For Hackers
repos.summary: 一体化黑客工具集，聚合了多种渗透测试与网络攻击工具。争议性较高，涉及安全研究边界，请仅在授权环境下使用。

repos.author: abhigyanpatwari
repos.name: GitNexus
repos.description: GitNexus: The Zero-Server Code Intelligence Engine - GitNexus is a client-side knowledge graph creator that runs entirely in your browser. Drop in a GitHub repo or ZIP file, and get an interactive knowledge graph wit a built in Graph RAG Agent. Perfect for code exploration
repos.summary: 零服务器端代码智能引擎，在浏览器中运行。导入 GitHub 仓库或 ZIP 文件即可获得交互式知识图谱和内置 Graph RAG Agent，特别适合代码探索和理解大型代码库。

repos.author: PostHog
repos.name: posthog
repos.description: 🦔 PostHog is an all-in-one developer platform for building successful products. We offer product analytics, web analytics, session replay, error tracking, feature flags, experimentation, surveys, data warehouse, a CDP, and an AI product assistant to help debug your code, ship features faster, and keep all your usage and customer data in one stack.
repos.summary: PostHog 全功能开发者平台，涵盖产品分析、Web 分析、会话回放、错误追踪、功能开关、实验、调查、数据仓库、CDP 以及 AI 调试助手。一站式产品成功工具，主打本地优先和数据自主。

repos.author: microsoft
repos.name: typescript-go
repos.description: Staging repo for development of native port of TypeScript
repos.summary: 微软官方的 TypeScript 原生 Go 语言移植项目 staging 仓库。将 TypeScript 编译器移植到 Go，实现更快的类型检查和跨平台部署，对 TypeScript 生态有重要意义。

repos.author: trycua
repos.name: cua
repos.description: Open-source infrastructure for Computer-Use Agents. Sandboxes, SDKs, and benchmarks to train and evaluate AI agents that can control full desktops (macOS, Linux, Windows).
repos.summary: 计算机使用 Agent 的开源基础设施，提供沙箱、SDK 和基准测试，支持训练和评估可控制完整桌面的 AI Agent（macOS/Linux/Windows）。AI 终端产品开发的关键底层组件。

repos.author: gastownhall
repos.name: beads
repos.description: Beads - A memory upgrade for your coding agent
repos.summary: 给 AI 编程助手的大脑加内存。让编码 Agent 记住更多上下文，减少幻觉和重复劳动，提升长期项目中的表现。面向 AI Native 开发工具链。

repos.author: curl
repos.name: curl
repos.description: A command line tool and library for transferring data with URL syntax, supporting DICT, FILE, FTP, FTPS, GOPHER, GOPHERS, HTTP, HTTPS, IMAP, IMAPS, LDAP, LDAPS, MQTT, MQTTS, POP3, POP3S, RTMP, RTMPS, RTSP, SCP, SFTP, SMB, SMBS, SMTP, SMTPS, TELNET, TFTP, WS and WSS. libcurl offers a myriad of powerful features
repos.summary: 经典命令行工具和库，支持数十种协议（HTTP(S)、FTP、SFTP、MQTT 等）进行 URL 数据传输。互联网基础设施级项目，每天被数十亿次调用，稳定性和兼容性极佳。

repos.author: home-assistant
repos.name: core
repos.description: 🏡 Open source home automation that puts local control and privacy first.
repos.summary: 开源家庭自动化平台，高度强调本地控制与隐私。Python 实现，支持数千种 IoT 设备集成，无需云端即可运行。智能家居爱好者的首选方案。
